name: theme-presets
description: Unified theme preset switcher with bundled tweakcn registry.
notes: CK-1F (2026-05-23) — collapsed TweakcnSwitcher + ThemePicker into one ThemePresetSwitcher. Added ThemePresetProvider context. HIDDEN_PRESETS filter drops gimmicky themes. Registry ships inside slice (registry-data.json) via dynamic import — no consumer public/ setup needed.
